prestazioni: 2GR-FKS 3.5L V6 engine (direct-injection, 300hp stock) upgraded with HKS GT-SS turbo kit (GT3037S turbocharger, 3.5bar MAP sensor, HKS intercooler core 600x300x65mm) paired with Tomei 272°/276° camshafts and HKS Hi-Power 4-2-1 stainless headers for 450whp target on E85

KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable damping, 40mm front/35mm rear spring rates) with custom valving for the Vellfire’s 1,800kg curb weight, paired with Cusco 22mm front/18mm rear sway bars and Whiteline adjustable end links

AP Racing 6-piston front/4-piston rear brake kit (355mm front rotors, 330mm rear rotors) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Motul RBF660 brake fluid, complemented by a Cusco 4-point bolt-in front strut tower bar and Cusco rear subframe brace
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit (Vellfire Z-specific, 50mm front/70mm rear fender flares) with custom carbon fiber side skirts and rear diffuser, finished in BASF RM+ Matte Graphite
Seibon Carbon fiber hood (Vellfire Z Premier-specific, 3.5kg weight reduction) with integrated HKS GT-SS turbo bonnet scoop and custom LED DRLs in the grille (Osram LEDriving LG 55W)

Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (19x9.5 +22 front, 19x10.5 +30 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35R19 front, 285/30R19 rear), paired with D2 Racing extended wheel studs (M12x1.5, 45mm length)
